zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard V Tempest Knt.於大約1310年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Sir John Tempest28歲，母親Isabel18歲。他於1342年10月30日之前與Joan Hertford結婚。他去世於1379年在他的家鄉享年70歲。

zh-hans.Stanford Rivers, Essex, England: 英国艾可斯坦福 瑞弗斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard V Tempest Knt.于大约1310年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Sir John Tempest28岁，母亲Isabel18岁。他于1342年10月30日之前与Joan Hertford结婚。他去世于1379年在他的家乡享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tempest
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): nickname for someone with a blustery temperament, from Middle English, Old French tempest(e) ‘storm’ (from Latin tempestas ‘weather, season’, a derivative of tempus ‘time’).

variants.name: Tempesta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Carlo, Raffaele, Agostino, Angelo, Carmelo, Cesare, Cesidio, Dante, Elio, Ezio, Gino.
Italian: nickname for someone with a stormy temperament, from tempesta ‘storm, tempest’ (see Tempest ).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard V Tempest Knt. was born about 1310, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir John Tempest, was 28 and his mother, Isabel, was 18. He married Joan Hertford before 30 October 1342. He died in 1379, in his hometown, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard V Tempest Knt. est né environ 1310, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Tempest, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Isabel, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Joan Hertford avant 30 octobre 1342. Il est décédé en 1379, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard V Tempest Knt. um 1310 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Tempest 28 und seine Mutter Isabel 18. Er hat vor 30. Oktober 1342 Joan Hertford geheiratet. Er starb 1379 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard V Tempest Knt. è nato il circa 1310 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Tempest, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Isabel, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Joan Hertford prima del 30 ottobre 1342. Morì nel 1379, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Bracewell, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアブレイセウエル
ja.Studley, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア

ja.lifeSummary: Richard V Tempest Knt.が約1310年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Tempestは28歳，母Isabelは18歳であった。1342年10月30日以前にJoan Hertfordと結婚した。彼は1379年に故郷で70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard V Tempest Knt.(이)가 대략 1310년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Tempest(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1342년 10월 30일 이전 Joan Hertford(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1379년 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard V Tempest Knt. nasceu aproximadamente 1310, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Tempest, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Isabel, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Hertford antes 30 de outubro de 1342. Ele faleceu em 1379, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard V Tempest Knt. родился около 1310 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Tempest было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Hertford перед 30 октябрь 1342 г. Он умер в 1379 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard V Tempest Knt. nació aproximadamente 1310, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Tempest, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Isabel, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Joan Hertford antes de 30 de octubre de 1342. Murió en 1379, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años.
